title: Expect Miracles
tags: How to be a Miracle Worker

body:
Expect miracles. I have been taking deep dives lately (some of them into woo woo land) and trying to practice self-care and all that good stuff. Last week’s #homwork assignment to watch a video of someone who inspires you and to take notes. Gabby Bernstein has been a huge source of inspiration for me since I met her almost 9 years ago at the Brentwood Lululemon store when she was promoting her first book, Add More ~ing. Last week my assistant and I took a mid-day break to watch the Ted Talk, How to be a Miracle Worker, and used the brand new Koi Creative Art Colors set from Sakura and my favorite Tim Holtz water brush to write down what resonated with us.

Thanks Lauren Hom for the fun! Any videos inspiring you lately?
